name: USB Awareness Message
description: Types a harmless training message to demonstrate how quickly keystroke automation can enter text.
defensive_lesson: Never plug in unknown USB devices and always lock an unattended workstation.

name: Portfolio URL Demo
description: Opens a safe user-provided website URL as a benign demonstration of keyboard automation.
defensive_lesson: A trusted-looking USB device can interact with an unlocked computer as if it were a keyboard.
